title: Client call to /play/kube incorrectly set tlsVerify
body: The API parameter `tlsVerify` should be the invert of the internal option `SkipTLSVerify`, fix this conversion.

comments.body:
Good catch @AlbanBedel 
An added regression test would be most welomed!

I don't think I'll be able to provide a test for this bug in a timely manner. It's surely not a major security issue as only users that explicitly set `--tls-verify=true` are affected, but I would still expect such a bug to be fixed ASAP and backported to all affected stable releases if there is such a process.

/lgtm
@QiWang19 Could you throw together a test for this.
